backstory.original: Baeloth Barrityl is the master of The Black Pits, the combat arena he claims is 'the best show in all the realms'. Baeloth captures hapless adventurers to fight to the death all for the sake of entertainment! When he's not commanding the attention of anyone near him, he's doing whatever he can to reinforce that he's one of the top five spellcasters in all the realms.
backstory.display: 贝洛斯·巴里提尔是黑坑的主人，他声称这个战斗竞技场是“所有国度中最好的演出”。贝洛斯会抓捕那些倒霉的冒险者，让他们为了娱乐而战斗到死。除了吸引身边所有人的注意力之外，他还会竭尽全力强化他在所有国度中五大咒术师之一的地位。

description.original: Baeloth fires a bolt of lightning at a random enemy, which deals damage and arcs up to 4 times dealing, 20% less damage per arc.
description.display: 贝洛斯向一名随机敌人发射一发闪电束。闪电束造成伤害后还会弹跳 4 次，每次弹跳伤害降低 20%。

longDescription.original: Baeloth fires a bolt of lightning at a random enemy, which deals damage and arcs up to 4 times dealing, 20% less damage per arc.
longDescription.display: 贝洛斯向一名随机敌人发射一发闪电束。闪电束造成伤害后还会弹跳 4 次，每次弹跳伤害降低 20%。

description.original: Najim streaks across the field, damaging all enemies, pushing survivors back slightly, and setting Baeloth's excitement stacks to max.
description.display: 纳吉姆穿过战场，对所有敌人造成伤害。未被击杀的敌人会被稍微击退，同时将贝洛斯的兴奋层数叠满。

longDescription.original: Najim streaks across the field, dealing massive damage to all enemies, pushing ones that survive back slightly, but more importantly increasing Baeloth's excitement stacks to max.
longDescription.display: 纳吉姆穿过战场，对所有敌人造成高额伤害，未被击杀的敌人会被稍微击退，但更重要的是，会将贝洛斯的兴奋层数叠满。

description.original: The thrill of battle excites Baeloth; this excitement is contagious and helps his fellow Champions deal more damage
description.display: 战斗的刺激会使贝洛斯兴奋起来。这种兴奋状态会传染，帮助其他勇士造成更多伤害。

description.desc: Enemies hit by Baeloth's Chain Lightning drop $amount% more gold when killed.
被贝洛斯的连环闪电击中的敌人，在死亡时多掉落 $amount% 金币

Enemies killed by Champions in the column ahead of or behind Baeloth explode into magical paper confetti, dealing damage and slowing enemies near them by 50% for 10 seconds. The damage done ignores debuffs and is either half of the hit that killed them or one quarter of their max health, whichever is higher. This effect can chain if the explosion kills an enemy.

effect_keys.override_key_desc: Whenever $target kills an enemy Baeloth's Cause for Celebration is triggered

description.desc: 被贝洛斯前列和后列的勇士击杀的敌人，会在死亡时爆炸成魔法纸屑，对附近敌人造成伤害并在 10 秒内将其减速 50%。造成的伤害无视减益，数值为勇士击杀该敌人的那次攻击伤害，或是敌人最大生命值的四分之一，以较高者为准。如果爆炸的魔法纸屑杀死了一名敌人，则此效果可连续传播

effect_keys.override_key_desc: 每当$target击杀敌人时，触发贝洛斯的“庆祝理由”

tipText.original: Champions immediately in front or behind Baeloth kill enemies in an explosion of confetti that can damage nearby enemies.
tipText.display: 被贝洛斯正前方或正后方的勇士击杀的敌人会爆炸成为彩色纸屑，并伤害附近的敌人。

conditions.desc: All Champions in the column in front or behind Baeloth do $amount___2% more damage per Morbid Excitement stack. Morbid Excitement loses 10% of stacks every 10 seconds and stacks cap at $max_stacks___2.^Stacks are earned for the following:^- A favored foe is defeated: +1 Stack^- An enemy drops more gold due to Paid Partially with Pain: +1 Stack^- An enemy explodes in confetti due to Cause for Celebration: +4 Stacks^- A chain reaction kills an enemy due to Cause for Celebration: +6 Stacks^- A Champion in any column in front of Baeloth takes damage: +5 Stacks^- A Champion dies: +100 Stacks

All Champions in the column in front or behind Baeloth do $amount___2% more damage per Morbid Excitement stack. Morbid Excitement loses 10% of stacks every 10 seconds and stacks cap at $max_stacks___2.^Stacks are earned for the following:^- A favored foe is defeated: +1 Stack^- An enemy drops more gold due to Paid Partially with Pain: +1 Stack^- An enemy explodes in confetti due to Cause for Celebration: +2 Stacks^- A chain reaction kills an enemy due to Cause for Celebration: +3 Stacks^- A Champion in any column in front of Baeloth takes damage: +5 Stacks^- A Champion dies: +100 Stacks

病态兴奋每堆叠一层，贝洛斯前列和后列的所有勇士提升 $amount___2% 伤害。病态兴奋的堆叠层数最多 $max_stacks___2 层，并且每 10 秒衰减 10%。^以下情况可堆叠病态兴奋层数：^- 击败一名偏好对手：+1 层^- 被痛苦偿还影响的敌人掉落了更多金币：+1 层^- 一名被庆祝理由影响的敌人爆炸成魔法纸屑：+4 层^- 庆祝理由的连锁反应杀死了一名敌人：+6 层- 贝洛斯前方任何一列的一位勇士受到伤害：+5 层^- 一位勇士死亡：+100 层

病态兴奋每堆叠一层，贝洛斯前列和后列的所有勇士提升 $amount___2% 伤害。病态兴奋的堆叠层数最多 $max_stacks___2 层，并且每 10 秒衰减 10%。^以下情况可堆叠病态兴奋层数：^- 击败一名偏好对手：+1 层^- 被痛苦偿还影响的敌人掉落了更多金币：+1 层^- 一名被庆祝理由影响的敌人爆炸成魔法纸屑：+2 层^- 庆祝理由的连锁反应杀死了一名敌人：+3 层- 贝洛斯前方任何一列的一位勇士受到伤害：+5 层^- 一位勇士死亡：+100 层

Baeloth's Djinn servant, Najim, will bring any Champion that dies back to life at 1HP and make them immune to all damage for 30 seconds. For as long as the resurrected Champion lives, the party's damage is increased by $amount%. This ability has a 60 second cooldown.

Baeloth's Djinn servant, Najim, will bring any Champion that dies back to life at 1HP and make them immune to all damage for 20 seconds. For as long as the resurrected Champion lives, the party's damage is increased by $amount%. This ability has a 60 second cooldown.
贝洛斯的巨灵仆人纳吉姆能使死去的勇士以生命值为 1 的状态复活，并使其在 30 秒内免疫所有伤害。被复活的勇士存活期间，队伍的伤害提升 $amount%。此技能有 60 秒冷却时间。
贝洛斯的巨灵仆人纳吉姆能使死去的勇士以生命值为 1 的状态复活，并使其在 20 秒内免疫所有伤害。被复活的勇士存活期间，队伍的伤害提升 $amount%。此技能有 60 秒冷却时间。

tipText.original: Champions revived by Najim provide a large buff which lasts until they are killed again.
tipText.display: 被纳吉姆复活的勇士会提供一个巨大增益，直到他们再次死亡。

description.desc: Increase the Cause for Celebration related stacking values for Morbid Excitement by $amount% and increase the damage bonus by $amount___2%
提升病态兴奋技能与庆祝理由相关的堆叠层数 $amount% 并提升伤害加成 $amount___2%

specializationDescription.original: Baeloth focuses on turning enemies to confetti, and the excitement that brings him
specializationDescription.display: 贝洛斯专注于将敌人变成彩色纸屑，以及由此带来的兴奋感

description.desc: Increase the max stacks of Morbid Excitement by $amount%
使病态兴奋的最大堆叠层数提升 $amount%

specializationDescription.original: Baeloth focuses on the excitement of battle, wringing even more benefit out of it.
specializationDescription.display: 贝洛斯专注于战斗的刺激，并从中榨取了更多利益。

description.desc: Champions resurrected by Najim are invulnerable for an additional 10 seconds and increase the pre stack damage bonus of resurrected Champions by $amount%
被纳吉姆复活的英雄无敌时间额外增加 10 秒，并提升堆叠之前的伤害加成 $amount%

specializationDescription.original: Baeloth focuses on his bond with Najim, granting even greater favor from the Djinn
specializationDescription.display: 贝洛斯专注于他与纳吉姆的纽带，获得巨灵带来的更多增益

upgrades.effectReference: {"effect_string":"buff_upgrade_effect_stacks_max_mult,100,4747","description":"Increases the max stacks of Baeloth's Morbid Excitement by $(amount)%."}
{"effect_string":"buff_upgrade_effect_stacks_max_mult,100,4747","description":"Increases the max stacks of Baeloth's Morbid Excitement by $(amount)%."}
{"effect_string":"buff_upgrade_effect_stacks_max_mult,100,4747","description":"Increases the max stacks of Baeloth's Morbid Excitement by $(amount)%."}

description.original: I shall find something far deadlier to trouble you with.
description.display: 我会找到更致命的东西，然后来麻烦你。

description.original: Batter your enemies to bloody rubbish!
description.display: 把你的敌人揍到血肉模糊！

description.original: No escape, no more tricks, no more performances. Your lives end here.
description.display: 别想逃跑，别想玩更多花招，别想着更多表演。你们的生命在此结束。

description.original: I am a fair master, as long as my needs are served by being fair.
description.display: 我是一个公平的主人，只要公平地满足我的需求就行。

description.original: How furious you must think I am!
description.display: 你必须得知道我有多么愤怒！

description.original: Unlike any you have seen before!
description.display: 和你以前见过的任何东西都不一样！

description.original: Champions, I have created the entertainment spectacle of a generation!
description.display: 勇士们，我创造了一代人的娱乐奇观！

description.original: What this contest needs is some fresh faces!
description.display: 这个比赛需要的是一些新鲜面孔！

description.original: Najim, prepare a suitable gift for them.
description.display: 纳吉姆，给他们准备一份合适的礼物。

description.original: NAJIM! You've changed, you know.
description.display: 纳吉姆！你变了，你知道的。

description.original: Nevermind magic, illusion, or lies; let's go with Plan A and kill those guys!
description.display: 莫管这些魔法、谎言、与幻象；咱们就按计划干掉那些坏蛋！

description.original: The Black Pits is a great place for someone, namely me, to get rich.
description.display: 黑坑是个好地方，尤其是我，就靠那里致富。

description.original: Might I make you an offer to join the Black Pits' team?
description.display: 我可以建议你们加入黑坑的队伍吗？

description.original: Now appearing in the Black Pits...your worst nightmare!
description.display: 现在出现在黑坑中的是......你最可怕的噩梦！

description.original: Did you know gold is highly conductive? Would you like a demonstration?
description.display: 你知道金子有很强的导电性吗？想不想看一下演示？

description.original: It's so much easier to stand out when I surround myself with mundanity!
description.display: 当我置身尘俗之中时更容易脱颖而出！

description.original: The show. MUST. Go on.
description.display: 演出，必须，继续。

effects.description: Grants Baeloth immunity to stun effects

Baeloth captures hapless adventurers to fight to the death all for the sake of entertainment! When he's not commanding the attention of anyone near him, he's doing whatever he can to reinforce that he's one of the top five spellcasters in all the realms.
